style_prompt:
Mimic the following writing style closely:
- Use short, punchy sentences (averaging under 12 words).
- Tone is casual and informal. Write like you're talking to a friend.
- Avoid contractions. Write out 'do not', 'it is', 'I am', 'cannot', etc.
- Keep vocabulary simple and everyday.
- Rarely use exclamation marks.
- Do not use em-dashes, parentheticals, or semicolons.
- Frequently start sentences with 'I' or 'My'.
- State your opinion directly and simply, then support it with basic reasoning.
- Repeat or circle back to the main point at the end of a paragraph for emphasis.
- Keep paragraphs short (around 4-6 sentences).
- Use commas and periods only — no complex punctuation.

samples.daily: My day was pretty good, I had a couple of classes today. My first class was chemistry.
samples.explain: A black hole is a big thing in space that absorbs anything that comes near it, it is really big and will continue growing with the more that it consumes.
samples.email_decline: Sorry, but i can't attend this event. I am busy at the time i am really sorry but i cannot attend the meeting.
samples.favorite_place: My favorite place is my room in my house. My room is where i play games, eat, and just watch videos.
samples.casual_reply: Yes I saw the announcement, i believe that it was a great announcement offering great ideas for the workspace.
samples.opinion: I believe remote work is not good for the office as it could lead to less productivity and less relationship with workers in the workplace
samples.freewrite: I Really like the chicken at canes. The chicken at canes is juicy and the sauce only adds to it. I swear sometimes it feels like heaven on earth because of how good it tastes. That is why I love Canes chicken.
